en.extract:
The white-necked coucal or pied coucal (Centropus ateralbus) is a species of cuckoo in the family Cuculidae. It is endemic to the Bismarck Archipelago. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest.

The '''white-necked coucal''' or '''pied coucal''' ('''''Centropus ateralbus''''') is a species of [[cuckoo]] in the family [[Cuculidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the [[Bismarck Archipelago]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]].
